title: LIP01 - Main: Custom
code:
<gds-div display="block" width="100%">
  <gds-list>
    <gds-list-item-pattern-01>
      <gds-flex gap="4xl" align-items="center">
      <gds-badge variant="positive">
        Active
      </gds-badge>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
          <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="start" gap="4xs">
          <gds-text font="detail-s-regular" tag="label">Label</gds-text>
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Value</gds-text>
        </gds-flex>
        <gds-flex flex-direction="column" justify-content="center" text-align="end" gap="4xs">
          <gds-text font="detail-m-book">Label</gds-text>
          <gds-formatted-account>54400023423</gds-formatted-account>
        </gds-flex>
      </gds-flex>
    </gds-list-item-pattern-01>
  </gds-list>
</gds-div>
